name: Grave Keeper
short_description: You are The Bounty Hunter and walked into The Forbidden Stronghold. It is taken by The Skeleton King. To collect all treasures you must kill him first.
detailed_description:
You are The Bounty Hunter and walked into The Forbidden Stronghold. It is taken by The Skeleton King. To collect all treasures you must kill him first.

Become a hero and fight against the biggest enemies.
Fight and improve the main character to hunt down monsters, dark skeletons, mages and other villains in deepest dungeons.

- Fight with enemies, beat bosses, get gold
- Find new items to use in battle
- Upgrade your skills and be fearless
- Versus Mode - compare strength with other knights

Grave Keeper is a Hack and Slash game in the fantasy world focused on the fight against The Skeleton King.

Grave Keeper is a Hack and Slash game in the fantasy world focused on the fight against The Skeleton King.
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish
